Quality Education.reason: The course is a graduate-level program focused on developing research and academic writing skills in linguistics, directly aligning with tertiary education (Target 4.3) and relevant skills for employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops 'Research skills' and 'Professional abilities in linguistics' for graduate students, which are directly relevant for future productive employment and decent work in academia (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course teaches students to write about 'research in the field of experimental phonology or psycholinguistics' and develop 'experimental research proposals', directly enhancing scientific research and innovation (Target 9.5).

develop the basic format of the experimental research proposals

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The instruction to 'Respect Copyright' promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3). Learning 'basic rules of argumentation' and giving 'constructive criticism' fosters accountable interactions (Target 16.6).
